hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/pom.xml" ]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/app -v hello-cicd-web-m2:/root/.m2 -w /app maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-21 mvn -q test 2>&1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi
